'''ât-d-zh''' ('''katadazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coddiwomple|coddiwomple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coddiwomple|coddiwomple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-d-zh
|-
! Lemma
| katadazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadazh|thitadazh]] || [[word:jitadazh|jitadazh]] || [[word:shitadazh|shitadazh]] || [[word:kitadazh|kitadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutadazh|thuthutadazh]] || [[word:jujutadazh|jujutadazh]] || [[word:shushutadazh|shushutadazh]] || [[word:kukutadazh|kukutadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutadazh|thutadazh]] || [[word:jutadazh|jutadazh]] || [[word:shutadazh|shutadazh]] || [[word:kutadazh|kutadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutadazh|thutadazh]] || [[word:jutadazh|jutadazh]] || [[word:shutadazh|shutadazh]] || [[word:kutadazh|kutadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetadazh|thetadazh]] || [[word:jetadazh|jetadazh]] || [[word:shetadazh|shetadazh]] || [[word:ketadazh|ketadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotadazh|thothotadazh]] || [[word:jojotadazh|jojotadazh]] || [[word:shoshotadazh|shoshotadazh]] || [[word:kokotadazh|kokotadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotadazh|thotadazh]] || [[word:jotadazh|jotadazh]] || [[word:shotadazh|shotadazh]] || [[word:kotadazh|kotadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotadazh|thotadazh]] || [[word:jotadazh|jotadazh]] || [[word:shotadazh|shotadazh]] || [[word:kotadazh|kotadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtadazh|thĂŠtadazh]] || [[word:jĂŠtadazh|jĂŠtadazh]] || [[word:shĂŠtadazh|shĂŠtadazh]] || [[word:kĂŠtadazh|kĂŠtadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatadazh|thathatadazh]] || [[word:jajatadazh|jajatadazh]] || [[word:shashatadazh|shashatadazh]] || [[word:kakatadazh|kakatadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatadazh|thatadazh]] || [[word:jatadazh|jatadazh]] || [[word:shatadazh|shatadazh]] || [[word:katadazh|katadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatadazh|thatadazh]] || [[word:jatadazh|jatadazh]] || [[word:shatadazh|shatadazh]] || [[word:katadazh|katadazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatadazh|shatadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatadazh|goshatadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatadazh|gokishatadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatadazhnĂŒ|shatadazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatadazhnknĂŒ|goshatadazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadazhnĂŒ|gokishatadazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatadazhshĂ«|shatadazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkshĂ«|goshatadazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatadazhshĂ«|gokishatadazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadazhro|shatadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkro|goshatadazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadazhro|gokishatadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadazhmu|shatadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkmu|goshatadazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadazhmu|gokishatadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatadazhsher|shatadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatadazhnksher|goshatadazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatadazhsher|gokishatadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatadazhng|shatadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkng|goshatadazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatadazhng|gokishatadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatadazhya|shatadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkya|goshatadazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatadazhya|gokishatadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatadazhyam|shatadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkyam|goshatadazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatadazhyam|gokishatadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadazhnĂŒshĂ«|shatadazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatadazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatadazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadazhnĂŒro|shatadazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadazhnknĂŒro|goshatadazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadazhnĂŒro|gokishatadazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadazhnĂŒmu|shatadazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadazhnknĂŒmu|goshatadazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadazhnĂŒmu|gokishatadazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shatadazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatadazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatadazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadazhshĂ«ro|shatadazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkshĂ«ro|goshatadazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadazhshĂ«ro|gokishatadazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadazhshĂ«mu|shatadazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkshĂ«mu|goshatadazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadazhshĂ«mu|gokishatadazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadazhronĂŒ|shatadazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkronĂŒ|goshatadazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadazhronĂŒ|gokishatadazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadazhroshĂ«|shatadazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkroshĂ«|goshatadazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadazhroshĂ«|gokishatadazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadazhromu|shatadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkromu|goshatadazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadazhromu|gokishatadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadazhmunĂŒ|shatadazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkmunĂŒ|goshatadazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadazhmunĂŒ|gokishatadazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadazhmushĂ«|shatadazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkmushĂ«|goshatadazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadazhmushĂ«|gokishatadazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadazhmuro|shatadazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadazhnkmuro|goshatadazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadazhmuro|gokishatadazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
